issues.detail: The skill does not include explicit error handling or retry logic for API failures, which may lead to unhandled exceptions.
The skill relies on Node.js and TypeScript SDKs, limiting compatibility with agents that do not support this runtime.

scenarios.name: Upload a 50MB CSV to a SharePoint document library
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented createUploadSession resumable pattern for >4MB files via Graph API; baseline attempts a direct PUT which would fail at this size.

scenarios.name: Bulk insert 50 list items into a SharePoint list
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented /$batch endpoint with the 20-request batch limit honored; baseline loops individual POSTs and ignores rate-limit considerations.
